seoTitle: Turner vs Uriarra Village — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Turner vs Uriarra Village: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turner and Uriarra Village.
heading: Turner vs Uriarra Village — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turner, Australian Capital Territory and Uriarra Village, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turner has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Uriarra Village (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turner or Uriarra Village safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turner has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Uriarra Village scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turner scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Uriarra Village scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turner or Uriarra Village?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turner has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
